hero.title: Your Practice, Elevated
hero.description: Streamline appointments, access patient histories instantly, and focus on what matters most—delivering exceptional care. NeronaHealth makes practice management effortless.

features.title: Practice Tools Built for You
features.description: Everything you need to run an efficient, patient-centered practice

features.title: Smart Scheduling
features.description: Manage your availability across multiple hospitals. Patients see your real-time slots and book seamlessly without back-and-forth calls.

features.title: Patient Overview
features.description: Access complete patient histories before consultations. View past visits, prescriptions, allergies, and ongoing treatments in one place.

features.title: Digital Prescriptions
features.description: Generate and send prescriptions directly to pharmacies. Patients receive digital copies, reducing errors and improving adherence.

features.title: Reduced No-Shows
features.description: Automated reminders keep patients informed. Our system reduces no-shows by 40%, maximizing your productive consultation hours.

features.title: Verified Profile
features.description: Showcase your qualifications, specialties, and hospital affiliations. Build trust with patients before they even book.

features.title: Practice Analytics
features.description: Understand your practice metrics. See patient demographics, common conditions, and appointment trends to optimize your services.

steps.title: Complete Your Profile
steps.description: Add your qualifications, specialties, and hospital affiliations. Verify your credentials for patient trust.

steps.title: Set Your Availability
steps.description: Define your consultation hours across locations. Our system automatically syncs across all booking channels.

steps.title: Manage Appointments
steps.description: View upcoming consultations, access patient records, and prepare for each visit with complete information.

steps.title: Deliver Better Care
steps.description: Use AI-assisted diagnosis, generate digital prescriptions, and maintain comprehensive patient records effortlessly.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Practice?
cta.description: Join thousands of doctors across Nigeria who trust NeronaHealth to manage their appointments and patient care.
